header: What TYPO3 teams say after switching

reviews.title: Pro paid for itself on the first project
reviews.review_text: We started free, then went Pro at €49/month for guaranteed LTS updates and early preset drops. The first upgrade cycle alone — a routine afternoon instead of a billable crisis — covered a year of the fee.

reviews.title: The €890 install was the right call
reviews.review_text: The creators installed and configured everything in a day — styleguide seeded, theme matched, editors briefed. Every one of the 255 elements has a backend preview, so training our 12-person content team took a single afternoon.

reviews.title: Hosting that just runs
reviews.review_text: We moved to managed hosting at €99/month — updates, daily backups, monitoring, EU datacenter. I'd love staging in the base plan instead of the €179 Business tier, but the peace of mind is absolutely real.
